jobs.title: Registered Client Assocaite
jobs.description:
Are you truly service oriented? Do you know how to take care of people?

We’re looking for a Registered Client Associate to:

• keep management systems up-to-date with client information
• educate clients on account services and capabilities
• help with the preparation of reports and other materials for client meetings
• collect the right documentation for opening new accounts and service requests
• plan team marketing events and maintain marketing materials
• provide the team with a detailed calendar of activities

jobs.title: Mutual Fund Product Specialist
jobs.description:
Are you passionate about driving client success through strategic mutual fund solutions? Ready to lead collaborative efforts across internal and external stakeholders to optimize service and product delivery? Are you driven by a deep interest in investment product management, eager to shape and innovate our offering to meet evolving market demands?

We’re looking for someone like that who can help us:

• Lead and direct the domestic and offshore mutual fund and money market fund business as the primary subject matter expert, providing strategic guidance to the Advisory Sales Desk, advisory program teams, Service Group, CIO, Advanced Planning, and other internal stakeholders.
• Drive the resolution of complex trading and operational challenges
• Foster strong relationships with internal partners, fund companies, and the field.
• Strategically manage relationships with over 450 mutual fund providers, partnering with Legal to manage the contract lifecycle, including creation, negotiation and execution of distribution agreement
• Develop and maintain marketing, disclosure, training, and educational materials, including managing internal and public website content.
• Identify opportunities to increase product awareness among Financial Advisors and clients and explore new product offerings with fund partners to support business growth and CIO alignment.
• Manage a suite of projects to enhance operational efficiency, improve the FA and client experience, and unlock revenue and cost saving opportunities.
• Forge and cultivate key partnerships across the firm to develop deep expertise in platforms and product offerings, encompassing both traditional and non-traditional assets.
• Monitor and analyze legislative, regulatory, and industry developments and lead the implementation of enhancements in collaboration with the Public Policy Office and internal control partners.

titleByLocale.en: Tech Engineer (power platform, NET Core, C#, Microsoft Graph, CSOM)
titleByLocale.de: Tech Ingenieur (power platform, NET Core, C#, Microsoft Graph, CSOM)
titleByLocale.fr: Tech Ingénieur (power platform, NET Core, C#, Microsoft Graph, CSOM)

jobs.description:
Do you enjoy creating digital workplace solutions that make collaboration seamless? Do you like solving complex engineering challenges and mentoring others? Do you want to help us deliver secure, scalable Microsoft 365 services for our global teams?

We’re looking for an M365 engineer to:
• design and build solutions across Microsoft 365 using modern engineering practices
• develop integrations and services using .NET Core, C#, Microsoft Graph and Power Platform
• automate provisioning, configuration and platform tasks using CSOM, PowerShell and reusable patterns
• lead technical discussions, provide guidance to other engineers and support code reviews
• troubleshoot issues across Microsoft 365 and Azure based components, ensuring stability and reliability
• support our change, governance and SDLC processes in a regulated environment

jobs.title: Investment Banking Analyst / Associate

descriptionByLocale.it: Do you enjoy working in dynamic teams? Are you excited by the opportunity to work on complex and market leading transactions? Are you solutions oriented? We’re looking for someone like that who can: – work together with senior bankers within the team and broader Global Banking to originate business, including developing pitch book presentations, financial modelling, and keeping up to date on marketing materials; – coordinate with our product team partners and sector coverage teams located in other geographies to develop cross-product ideas; – build and maintain client relationships to expand their network; – actively participate in all phases of the transaction process including financial modeling, due diligence, internal credit approval, drafting investor materials, loan syndications; and – develop a broad skill base including an understanding of a range of UBS industry sectors and product groups.

jobs.title: AI Product Manager – Wealth Management Focus

titleByLocale.it: AI Product Manager – Focus sulla gestione della ricchezza
titleByLocale.en: AI Product Manager – Wealth Management Focus
titleByLocale.de: AI Product Manager – Wealth Management Focus
titleByLocale.fr: AI Product Manager – Wealth Management Focus

jobs.description:
Are you an experienced and entrepreneurial product manager with deep expertise in wealth management? Are you passionate about shaping and delivering AI-powered solutions that transform client and advisor experiences? Do you thrive at the intersection of domain knowledge, AI innovation, and digital transformation?

We are looking for an AI Product Manager to:
• identify, prioritize, and deliver AI/ML solutions that address real client and advisor needs within a regulated environment
• own the product lifecycle from ideation and prototyping to pilot and full-scale rollout—ensuring solutions are both innovative and practical for wealth management use cases
• collaborate closely with stakeholders across business, technology, and data science, translating complex requirements into actionable product roadmaps
• drive agile delivery through sprint planning, continuous prioritization, and clear success metrics, ensuring timely and impactful outcomes
• champion new AI capabilities such as personalization, intelligent insights, and digital advisory tools, always with a focus on client value and regulatory compliance
• act as an entrepreneurial leader, proactively identifying opportunities, challenging the status quo, and fostering a culture of innovation within the team
• engage with external partners (e.g., Microsoft, fintechs) to explore, test, and scale cutting-edge AI solutions relevant to wealth management

jobs.title: Quant Analyst, Financial Institutions & Wholesale Credit Risk Models

titleByLocale.it: Quant Analista, Financial Institutions & Wholesale Credit Risk Models
titleByLocale.en: Quant Analyst, Financial Institutions & Wholesale Credit Risk Models
titleByLocale.de: Quant Analyst, Financial Institutions & Wholesale Credit Risk Models
titleByLocale.fr: Quant Analyste, Financial Institutions & Wholesale Credit Risk Models

jobs.description:
Does quantitative modelling excite you? Are you experienced in credit risk?

We're looking for someone like you to:

• use techniques from quantitative risk management, financial mathematics, and econometrics to develop and maintain rating and LGD models used for Basel III Pillar 1 capital requirement and IFRS9 impairment losses
• be responsible for model maintenance and execution, ensuring alignment with stakeholders’ requirements and internal policies
• collaborate with Risk Officers, Business Managers, Risk IT and other stakeholders to support the proper implementation and execution of risk models as well as regulatory exercises
• present methodologies to management and regulators for approval
• contribute to the documentation of models, data, and system improvement

jobs.title: Quant Analyst, Corporate & Wholesale Credit Risk Scenario Models

titleByLocale.it: Quant Analista, Corporate & Wholesale Credit Risk Scenario Models
titleByLocale.en: Quant Analyst, Corporate & Wholesale Credit Risk Scenario Models
titleByLocale.de: Quant Analyst, Corporate & Wholesale Credit Risk Scenario Models
titleByLocale.fr: Quant Analyste, Corporate & Wholesale Credit Risk Scenario Models

jobs.description:
Are you interested in quantitative risk modelling and knowledgeable of statistical, mathematical and econometrical models used in the financial industry? Are you an innovative thinker who likes to challenge the status quo and apply new analytical techniques to solve quantitative problems?

At UBS, we re-imagine the way we work, the way we connect with each other – our colleagues, clients and partners – and the way we deliver value. Being agile will make us more responsive, more adaptable, and ultimately more innovative.

We’re looking for a Quantitative Analyst to develop and maintain stress testing and provisioning models:
• develop and maintain stress testing and provisioning models in line with international regulatory and accounting standards requirements
• support with ongoing and new regulatory initiatives to manage our risk
• contribute to the development, refinement and implementation of risk models
• perform and document model performance and confirmation analysis
• communicate technical information to Senior Management, Risk Officers and Subject Matter Experts

jobs.title: Execution Hub Trader
jobs.description:
Are you a motivated team-player with a keen eye for details? Are you analytical and thrive in high-pressure environment? Do you have knowledge of mutual funds and alternative investments?

We’re looking for someone who can
• facilitate timely and accurate market-side order placement and market-side finishing activities, including but not limited to, active order monitoring and chasing late confirmations, prompt detection of irregularities and efficient exception handling
• effectively manage client-side sales trading activities including advisory on order entry, special handling
and pre/at-trade execution-related client queries originating from Wealth Management clients and 3rd party Financial Institutions
• handle inbound information in Central information Management system received from Transfer Agent
• support and/or drive initiatives to improve efficiency and manage risk; proactively keeping in step with market development
• follow rules and regulations, compliance guidelines and desk procedures/protocols

• facilitate timely and accurate market-side order placement and market-side finishing activities, including but not limited to, active order monitoring and chasing late confirmations, prompt detection of irregularities and efficient exception handling
• effectively manage client-side sales trading activities including advisory on order entry, special handling and pre/at-trade execution-related client queries originating from Wealth Management clients and 3rd party Financial Institutions

• follow rules and regulations, compliance guidelines and desk procedures/protocols

jobs.title: Equity Research Analyst – Financials
jobs.description:
Do you want to use your fundamental equity market expertise and portfolio management knowledge to help manage portfolios and identify new investment opportunities? Do you enjoy uncovering what really drives value in financial institutions? Can you turn deep analysis into clear investment views that shape portfolios?

We’re looking for a Equity Research Analyst - Financials, to:

• generate differentiated bottom-up investment ideas across the financials sector (e.g banks, insurers, capital markets, specialty finance) for our client portfolios
• conduct proprietary research through management meetings, industry expert calls, industry conferences, filings, and data analysis to formulate differentiated insights and form high-conviction investment views
• build and maintain detailed financial models, including stress testing under different macro scenarios
• translate detailed fundamental analysis into clear investment recommendations that support portfolio decisions
• partner closely with portfolio managers to move ideas from research into our portfolios
• convert industry insights into comprehensive investment recommendations and risk assessments
• communicate insights clearly and succinctly through written notes and presentations to colleagues and clients

jobs.title: Client Associate
jobs.description:
A Client Associate services clients and provides operational and administrative support to Financial Advisors.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate clients on account services and capabilities
• Input data in to financial planning tools
• Assist with the preparation of reports and other materials for client meetings
• Ensure appropriate documentation is collated for new accounts and service requests

Key Deliverables:
• Leverage communications channels to enhance relationships with clients
• Maintain management systems with up to date client information
• Organize logistics for team marketing events and maintain marketing materials
• Provide team with calendar detailing daily, weekly and monthly activities
• Identify service opportunities for clients

jobs.title: Intern
jobs.description:
Are you a motivated self-starter? Can you take an assignment and run with it? If you're ready to dive into a client-focused work environment, an internship at UBS Wealth Management may be the right fit for you.
We welcome interns to join our team to learn about the Wealth Management industry and our firm. Our financial advisors and their teams deliver a fully integrated set of products and services specifically designed to address the needs of ultra-high net worth and high-net worth individuals and families. This is an opportunity to gain valuable insight, develop new skills, and establish a network of mentors and business contacts.

We're looking for an intern to:

• work on projects that have a real impact on clients and gain product knowledge
• support our team of Wealth Management advisors and wealth strategy associates
• compile market and investment research
• leverage Microsoft Excel skills to assist with portfolio analysis
• prepare client meeting materials and generate performance reports
• assist with the responsibilities of running an entrepreneurial business model
• attend presentations by WMA leaders to help you understand our industry, culture and strategy

titleByLocale.it: Authorized Officer, Operational Risk and Data Specialista
titleByLocale.en: Authorized Officer, Operational Risk and Data Specialist
titleByLocale.de: Authorized Officer, Operational Risk and Data Spezialist
titleByLocale.fr: Authorized Officer, Operational Risk and Data Spécialiste

jobs.description:
UBS Business Solutions US LLC is seeking an Authorized Officer, Operational Risk and Data Specialist in Weehawken, NJ
Are you an innovative thinker? Do you enjoy delivering enhanced change capabilities across a range of business functions? Are you incredibly organized with an eye for detail?

We’re looking for an Authorized Officer, Operational Risk and Data Specialist to:
• Support and coordinate the preparation of regulatory operational risk reports and metrics. Perform analytical reviews, including data analysis and creating presentations of key operational risk metrics to senior management.
• Triage with other teams globally to ensure an efficient reporting process. Prepare and review the CCAR quarterly reporting submissions to respective supervisory authorities.
• Extract meaningful business insights from large sets of data and report to senior management. Assist in the data identification and mining process for internal loss events that supports CCAR Operational Risk processes.
• Review external events and other metrics to support the CCAR Operational Risk process.
• Can work hybrid (In-office/remote).

Qualified Applicants apply through SH-ProfRecruitingcc@ubs.com. Please reference 001683. NO CALLS PLEASE. EOE/M/F/D/V

Salary Range & Work Schedule: $101,500 to $131,000/year, 40 hrs/wk. This notice is being posted in connection with an application for permanent Alien Labor Certification. Any person may comment or provide documentary evidence bearing on this application to: U.S. Department of Labor, Employment and Training Administration, Office of Foreign Labor Certification, 200 Constitution Avenue NW, Room N-5311, Washington, DC 20210.

The expected salary range(s) for this role as of the date of this posting is/are based on factors including, but not limited to, experience, qualifications, education, location and skill level. This role may also be eligible for discretionary incentive compensation. For benefits information, please visit ubs.com/usbenefits.

jobs.title: APAC Regional Lead - Agency Trading Market Engineering Technology

titleByLocale.it: APAC Regional Lead - Agenzia Trading Market Engineering Technology
titleByLocale.en: APAC Regional Lead - Agency Trading Market Engineering Technology
titleByLocale.de: APAC Regional Lead - Agency Trading Market Engineering Technology
titleByLocale.fr: APAC Regional Lead - Agency Trading Market Engineering Technology

jobs.description:
As APAC Regional Lead for Market Engineering Technology, you will serve as the senior technology executive and primary business interface accountable for Agency Trading Market Engineering platforms across APAC, with leadership responsibility for Agency Trading Technology in Hong Kong.
This role carries end to end accountability for platform performance, resilience, and regulatory standing, ensuring that technology is a differentiating enabler of front office trading while operating within the firm’s risk and control framework.

You will operate at the intersection of engineering leadership, business partnership, and regulatory accountability, shaping both the technical direction and organizational capability required to support high volume, low latency trading in complex APAC markets.
Acting as the regional face of Technology, you will lead through senior leaders, influence global direction, and serve as the ultimate escalation authority for material delivery, production risk, and regulatory matters.

jobs.title: IB BRM – Operational Risk Manager

titleByLocale.it: IB BRM – Gestione del rischio operativo

jobs.description:
Are you able to evaluate risk by understanding and talking to the business? Are you self-motivated and driven with vision, ability to drive multiple work streams with stringent deadlines?

We’re looking for someone like that who can provide operational risk support to IB, specifically to:
– act as a point of contact within the global IB BRM team based in Hong Kong, working in partnership with the business and our logistics & control partners across a broad spectrum of Operational Risk Management objectives.
• – work on a number of operational risk change initiatives working closely with stakeholders across the Investment Bank COO and other functions globally
• – monitor and challenge global functions on their delivery of the front to back control environment. Making recommendations on controls design and operating effectiveness
• – review and analyze operational risk events and escalations for trends and track actions to resolution.
• – provide proactive and constructive challenge in all aspects of the role, encouraging best practice and striving for consistency on a global basis
• – support Operational Risk initiatives cross IB and provide input for the ongoing development of them
• – provide support to Product-aligned COOs on various control improvement and remediation initiatives.
• – provide transparent risk reporting to management, auditors and regulators
• – identify, evaluate and mitigate risks, proactively formulate global solutions
• – act as an SME on operational risk framework for the Investment Bank and other relevant key stakeholders
• – contribute to design and documentation of control processes and procedures and identify, evaluate and mitigate risks for deficient controls

jobs.title: Client Service Core Specialist in Asset Management Team

titleByLocale.it: Client Service Core Specialista in Asset Management Team
titleByLocale.en: Client Service Core Specialist in Asset Management Team
titleByLocale.de: Client Service Core Spezialist in Asset Management Team
titleByLocale.fr: Client Service Core Spécialiste in Asset Management Team

jobs.description:
Do you like to contribute to great client experience and to interact with sales colleagues globally? Is a client-oriented mindset important to you and your trademark? Are you commercially minded and driven to help build a business? If yes, then we are looking for you.

We’re searching for a Client Service Core Specialist in UBS Asset Management to:
• Maintain and monitor data quality (e.g., agreement updates, accounts mapping, client reporting related information) for our clients such as pension funds, sovereign wealth clients and distributors in central systems.
• Act as the main point of contact for client inquiries, coordinate responses with internal teams, manage complaints, and ensure client satisfaction by delivering timely and accurate information and services.
• Attend, host, and prepare for training days, due diligence meetings, and sales pitches. Organize materials, logistics, and follow-up communications in partnership with the Client Relationship Manager (CRM).
• Handle RFP coordination, cash-flow notifications, fund launches/changes, and support life-cycle changes and maintain accurate client data in internal systems.
• Oversee fee invoicing, trailer fee approvals, payment coordination, and proactively manage outstanding invoices (aged debtors).
• Execute processes and controls in a timely, accurate, and complete manner and ensure compliance with regulations and manage audit requests.
• Contribute to and potentially lead projects to further improve the Client Service function.

jobs.title: Fixed Income Structurer
jobs.description:
We are seeking a senior structurer to play a leading role within our Fixed Income Structuring team, with a particular focus on credit markets. The role combines product origination, client engagement, advanced structuring and pricing, and some leadership responsibility.
Key responsibilities include:
• Lead the structuring, pricing, execution, and documentation of complex fixed income transactions across OTC and structured note formats
• Act as a senior point of reference for credit markets, contributing to product strategy, risk discussion, and desk wide innovation
• Originate trade ideas and client solutions, working closely with sales to engage directly with clients, understand their objectives, and deliver tailored outcomes
• Design, model, and price bespoke payoffs across credit and rates products, including scenario analysis, stress testing, and lifecycle risk management
• Provide deep expertise on documentation, including ISDA, credit annexes, and structured note documentation, coordinating with legal, operations, and risk to ensure robust execution
• Lead and mentor junior structurers, setting technical standards, reviewing work, and supporting their development
• Drive platform and process improvements, including enhancement of analytical tools, pricers, automation of pricing runs, and scalable trade processes
• Collaborate closely with trading, sales, risk, legal, and compliance, exercising sound judgment expected of a senior front office professional

jobs.title: Client Onboarding Business Manager
jobs.description:
You will be managing business within IB Onboarding for your product line – Cash & Synthetic Equities Prime Brokerage, FX PB, ETD & OTC Clearing for Global Markets, Investment Bank.

Your role is to own onboarding across the value chain for your product, face off to the business and clients, introduce the value chain, and successfully manage the pipeline across the firm. You will serve as the “Voice of the Client” acting as a point of contact throughout the process to ensure a best in class onboarding experience by utilizing our experience, process, and technology.

We’re looking for Client Onboarding Business Manager for Cash & Synthetic Equities Prime Brokerage, FX PB, ETD & OTC Clearing

• You are client focused.
• You easily build relationships and can influence the outcome.
• You demonstrate commercial mindset on daily basis.
• You are results driven, take ownership and accountability.
• You are problem solver, understand the risk and can mitigate it.
• You enjoy data driven analysis, challenging process, and continuous improvement.
• You like to work across teams and locations

Detailed salary information :
• New York: the salary range for this role is $140000 to $180000
The expected salary range(s) for this role as of the date of this posting is/are based on factors including, but not limited to, experience, qualifications, education, location and skill level. This role may also be eligible for discretionary incentive compensation. For benefits information, please visit ubs.com/usbenefits .

jobs.title: ESG Analyst
jobs.description:
Are you interested in ESG analysis that directly influences credit decisions? Are you motivated by contributing your expertise within a collaborative, global team environment?

We are looking for ESG Analyst to:

• working alongside credit analysts in the US and UK to assess material ESG risks and opportunities for loan and bond issuers
• developing and maintaining issuer level ESG assessments and ratings, with clear documentation of key risk drivers and rationale
• presenting ESG analysis and ratings to the ESG Committee and responding to feedback as part of formal review processes
• conducting reputational risk assessments, including evaluation of controversies, governance concerns, and emerging ESG issues
• monitoring ESG risks through news flow, regulatory developments, and external events, proactively flagging material developments
• supporting industry level ESG research, including identification of sector specific ESG risk themes and trends

jobs.title: SAP Fioneer Financial Control Consultant ( Functional)

titleByLocale.it: SAP Fioneer Financial Control Consulente ( Functional)
titleByLocale.en: SAP Fioneer Financial Control Consultant ( Functional)
titleByLocale.de: SAP Fioneer Financial Control Berater ( Functional)
titleByLocale.fr: SAP Fioneer Financial Control Consultant ( Functional)

jobs.description:
We are seeking an experienced SAP Fioneer Financial Control (FC) functional consultant to support the implementation and optimization of the financial control process. The role requires a strong blend of functional expertise, stakeholder engagement, and SAP product knowledge to translate business requirements into effective solutions. The position will play a critical role in driving the design, implementation and adoption of the Fioneer financial control module, while ensuring alignment with broader SAP finance architecture.

Key Responsibilities
• Lead and support the implementation of SAP Fioneer Financial control module, including requirement gathering, solution design and deployment.
• Engage with business stakeholders to understand financial control requirements, pain points, and improvement opportunities.
• Translate business needs into functional specifications and solution designs
• Provide subject matter expertise on financial control processes (reconciliation, substantiation, reporting)
• Collaborate with technical teams to ensure accurate system configuration and integration.
• Evaluate existing processes and recommend best practices and optimization opportunities.
• Support UAT, training, and post implementation stabilization.
• Support the transition from legacy financial control systems to SAP Fioneer financial control including process assessment, gap analysis and migration support.
• Partner with vendor to drive co-innovation and solution enhancements aligned and business and control requirements.
• Act as a bridge between business and IT teams, ensuring clear communication and alignment.
• Provide inputs on data models, controls, and governance frameworks related to financial control.

jobs.title: Spécialiste Crédits 80-100%
jobs.description:
Êtes-vous passionné par les prêts bancaires ? Vous êtes autonome, fiable et possédez une grande conscience professionnelle ? Vous appréciez travailler dans un environnement dynamique et stimulant où les objectifs vous motivent ? Si vous avez répondu oui à ces questions, alors rejoignez notre équipe Credit Services et faites partie d'une entreprise où votre talent sera reconnu et valorisé.

En tant que spécialiste crédits, vous serez chargé de :

• traiter les demandes de prêt approuvées à l'échelle nationale, en jouant un rôle clé dans la réalisation des projets de nos clients
• préparer les contrats de crédit avec les documents de sûreté appropriés, assurant ainsi la documentation nécessaire à nos prêts
• saisir et gérer les crédits et garanties (p.ex. les cédules hypothécaires, polices et cautions)
• emettre les promesses de paiement et leur exécution
• assurer la correspondance et le dialogue avec les registres fonciers, notaires, banques et compagnies d’assurance, établissant des relations de confiance avec nos partenaires
• maintenir des contacts professionnels avec les conseillers à la clientèle, les Credit Officers et les services juridiques

jobs.title: Trust Officer
jobs.description:
Are you an innovator who loves to solve problems and increase efficiencies and productivity?

We are looking for a trust officer to:

• administer and manage a complex portfolio of companies and trusts, including charitable foundations
• draft and review trust and corporate documentation
• provide tailored solutions to meet internal and external client needs while ensuring high service standards
• monitor client activities and transactions to ensure accuracy, compliance, and quality of service
• liaise directly with UBS Wealth Planners, Client Advisors, and external professional advisors across global financial centres
• collaborate cross functionally, support client meetings and presentations, respond to client enquiries, and participate in projects as required

jobs.title: Client Account Manager
jobs.description:
Are you looking for a new challenge in a fast paced Wealth Management environment? Do you want to be part of a high performing team?

We’re looking for a Client Account Manager to:

• be the point of entry for processing client orders, e.g. stock orders, foreign exchange, loans and deposits
• be the direct contact for daily banking activities and administrative work for our clients
• manage daily client transactions and carry out inquiries and troubleshooting
• perform account maintenance tasks and client-related processes; e.g. account opening and closing, suitability reviews, initial and recurring KYC and due diligence
• research, follow-up and resolve client inquiries and problems through effective interaction with clients, and internal partners in a timely and professional manner
• identify cross-selling opportunities and discuss them with the client advisor
• support client advisors in preparing for meetings and occasionally join client meetings

jobs.description:
Do you have a passion for analyzing financial data and related information to solve varying and complex suitability and conflicts of interest related issues before taking on new business? Are you able to manage complex and varied projects in an efficient and effective manner under a compressed timeline? Are you able to liaise with people globally?

The BSRRC Specialist is expected to:
• take an active, leadership role in the conflict clearance and business selection process
• liaise with the Global Banking business to gather relevant details and perform conflict checks
• identify and resolve complex issues arising during the conflict check process while managing deal teams’ expectations around outcome and turnaround time
• lead strategic projects (e.g., enhanced automation and streamlining of processes, banker training, etc.)
• work closely with Compliance and Operational Risk Control on audit and regulatory issues and responses when required
• generate new ideas and creative approaches that help push the business forward
• make sound and balanced judgments (and always within professional, ethical, regulatory and legal standards)
• motivate and inspire others by providing a vision of shared goals
• train, mentor and develop the junior members of the team

jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
jobs.description:
Are you passionate about building scalable, intelligent AI models and agents that transform finance business processes? Do you enjoy working with cutting-edge AI technologies like Machine Learning, Generative AI, and Agentic AI? Are you confident at embedding AI into business workflows to create measurable value? Do you like to be challenged and encouraged to learn and grow professionally?

We’re looking for an AI Engineer to:

• design and implement AI capabilities (models, assistants and agents) for Finance
• develop capabilities and predictive models for anomaly detection, clustering, classification, variance analysis and forecasting.
• develop assistants and agents for contextual commentary generation, driver analysis and other actional workflows in Finance.
• build production-grade scalable AI solutions in a multi-agentic architecture.
• work with a global team of AI scientists, engineers, and business stakeholders to deliver impactful AI products.
• take ownership of end-to-end delivery within a collaborative and agile environment.
• embrace complex business requirements and enjoy the challenge of translating them into intelligent solutions.
• work as part of an agile development team within a global technology team.

jobs.title: Planning Specialist
jobs.description:
We are looking for a Planning Specialist to work with a large advisory team in the Cincinnati Market. The ideal candidate is highly motivated, exceptionally organized, and has a passion for helping others create sound financial plans.

This position works closely with the senior Wealth Management Advisor in charge of planning for the team. Responsibilities include:
• Engaging with clients and prospects to help them understand and articulate their financial goals with respect to retirement, education, wealth preservation, and other.
• Developing coherent and realistic financial plans that address the interrelated concerns – risk tolerance, growth requirements, time frames, investment instruments and structure, tax sensitivity, legal/regulatory considerations, etc. – involved in complex planning situations.
• Quantifying and modeling financial goals to clarify and illuminate decision points for advisor use and presentation to clients.
• Collect and input data into a range of planning software. Create reports, spreadsheets, etc. based on that data for presentation to clients.
• Proactive collaboration with team members to maintain a positive, productive team environment.

If you enjoy financial planning, and want to work with a respected, successful and engaged team committed to providing valuable, top-tier, planning advice to others, this position may be the one for you.

jobs.title: Global Markets – Agency Algorithmic Trading – Quantitative Analyst

titleByLocale.it: Global Markets – Agency Algorithmic Trading – Quantitative Analista

titleByLocale.de: Global Markets – Agency Algorithmic Trading – Quantitative Analyst

jobs.description:
We’re looking for a quantitative analyst to support algorithmic trading platform and client analytics and quantitative configuration across APAC markets. The role combines platform level quantitative work with production analytics, transaction cost analysis (TCA), and client facing performance review support. You will:
• Develop and maintain quantitative frameworks that influence algorithmic trading behaviour, including market specific configuration and analytics logic.
• Enhance analytics pipelines used for algorithm monitoring and performance analysis, including helping drive data availability and re processing requirements with relevant data teams.
• Perform execution performance analysis and transaction cost analysis (TCA) for internal and client facing reviews.
• Analyse execution behaviour across market conditions, arrival times, and execution styles, translating results into clear, actionable insights, client specific and broader platform / algo improvements and internalization.
• Support methodology discussions and follow up analysis related to analytics outputs and benchmarks as well as providing market microstructure based insights.
• Partner with Trading, Product, Technology, and Control teams to ensure analytics outputs align with platform behaviour and business requirements.

titleByLocale.de: Market risk model validation Quantitative Analyst

jobs.description:
We are looking for a Market risk quant in the Market risk model validation team in India to perform:
• Independent validation of market risk models in line with the UBS model governance policy and regulatory requirements. Key responsibilities include
• Assess the model's conceptual soundness and methodology
• Check the appropriateness/quality of input data used for model development, review appropriateness of model parameters, accuracy of the model calibration etc.
• Review model outcome, impacts, or develop alternate benchmark approaches to challenge model outputs (as appropriate)
• Assess model risk, providing effective challenge to model assumptions and evaluate model limitations
• Write comprehensive validation reports, documenting the assessments to required standards
• Collaborate effectively with stakeholders globally to understand / challenge potential model risks; communicate validation findings to relevant stakeholders
• Support ongoing review of model performance and model change reviews to ensure models remain fit for purpose

• Independent validation of market risk models in line with the UBS model governance policy and regulatory requirements. Key responsibilities include
• Assess the model's conceptual soundness and methodology
• Check the appropriateness/quality of input data used for model development, review appropriateness of model parameters, accuracy of the model calibration etc.
• Review model outcome, impacts, or develop alternate benchmark approaches to challenge model outputs (as appropriate)
• Assess model risk, providing effective challenge to model assumptions and evaluate model limitations
• Write comprehensive validation reports, documenting the assessments to required standards
• Collaborate effectively with stakeholders globally to understand / challenge potential model risks; communicate validation findings to relevant stakeholders
• Support ongoing review of model performance and model change reviews to ensure models remain fit for purpose

jobs.title: Sachbearbeiter /in Kindes- und Erwachsenenschutzrecht
jobs.description:
Haben Sie Interesse an Themen mit rechtlichem Bezug und eine gute Auffassungsgabe? Sind effizientes und exaktes Arbeiten Ihre Stärken? Suchen Sie den Einstieg in die Finanzbranche?
Wir suchen eine/n Sachbearbeiter/in Kindes- und Erwachsenenschutzrecht als Verstärkung für unser Team mit folgenden Aufgaben:
• Analyse und Bearbeitung von behördlichen Massnahmen der Kindes- und Erwachsenenschutzbehörde mittels Recherche und Mutationen im eigenen Banksystem
• Abwicklung von nicht-behördlichen Massnahmen in Form von Vorsorgeaufträgen und Vertretung von Ehegatten
• Durchführung von Kindsvermögenssicherungsmassnahmen
• Formelle sowie materielle Kontrolle der Legitimationen wie auch Dokumentation der Massnahmen
• Telefonische und schriftliche Unterstützung von Kundenberater/Innen bezüglich fachlicher Anfragen
• Telefonischer und schriftlicher Kontakt mit Behörden, Ämtern, Anwälten wie auch Notaren
• Allgemeine administrative Arbeiten

jobs.title: Spezialist/in Hypotheken und Grundbuchwesen 80 – 100%
jobs.description:
Hast du Erfahrungen in der Hypothekarverarbeitung und dem Schweizerischen Grundbuchwesen?
Ist effizientes, exaktes und verantwortungsbewusstes Arbeiten genau deine Stärke?
Hast du Freude an administrativen Tätigkeiten mit flexiblen Arbeitszeiten?

Dann bewirb dich, denn wir wollen wachsen und suchen Verstärkung!

Deine Aufgaben:
• Selbständige Abwicklung der bewilligten Kreditgesuche
• Erstellen von allen notwendigen Kredit- und Sicherungsdokumenten
• Abbilden und Bewirtschaften von Hypotheken und Sicherheiten (z.B. Grundpfänder, Policen, Bürgschaften)
• Erstellen von Zahlungsversprechen sowie fristgerechter Ausführung von Zahlungen
• Sicherstellung aller Bedingungen für die Freigabe der Hypotheken und Zahlungen
• Begleitung und korrekte Terminierung der Geschäftsfälle in Eigenverantwortung
• Korrespondenz mit Grundbuchämtern, Notaren, Banken und Versicherungsgesellschaften
• Pflichtbewusster Umgang mit potenziellen Risiken

jobs.title: Global banking - Investment Banking Associate
jobs.description:
Are you a leader in innovation? Do you know how to come up with creative ideas for clients? We’re looking for an Associate in the Global Markets to :

•take lead in the execution of mandates working with cross functional teams and senior bankers. Carry out valuations, financial modeling, credit, capital structure and financial returns analysis & lead on transaction execution
• •work with senior coverage – sector and product bankers to come up with new ideas to pitch to companies.
• •work with industry / corporate finance team to execute transactions, and position companies, liaison with syndicate / sales team to market transaction.
• •prepare and present materials such as information memorandums and presentations for boards of directors, internal review committees and solicitations (pitches)
• •assessment and evaluation of key trends and opportunities for the specific sectors.
• •help to drive the client franchise by working with our sector groups and global offices to generate opportunities of relevance and clients.
•you will be encouraged to mentor, guide and develop Analysts/ ENOs, help coordinate Analyst/ENOs work on projects, develop them through delegation of responsibility, and takes a prominent role in training initiatives.
•deliver continuous process improvements, in view of the changing operating and regulatory environment

jobs.title: Data Engineer-Python, Pyspark, sql, Databricks
jobs.description:
Are you passionate about data engineering? Are you keen to manage data that can materially help teams improve the way they work? You have the opportunity to join the team working on the new DevLens initiative, an ambitious data initiative to help our 40,000 IT employees organization accelerate value delivery to customers, improve organization efficiency and developer experience. Together with your team you will contribute to building and maintaining innovative data products spanning all engineering activities across UBS IT lines of business.

You will work with large delta tables on Azure Databricks with Dagster, AKS, PySpark & SparkSQL, Confluent Kafka, REST APIs, database platforms, serving data products on Starburst/Trino data mesh.

We’re looking for a passionate Data Engineer to:
• Develop, support and improve data pipelines and data products with attention to governance including sourcing, lineage, modelling, security, quality, distribution and efficiency
• Automate testing & deployment where possible using CI/CD pipelines
• Build observability to monitor and resolve production issues
• Analyse and organize raw data and be able to combine multiple datasets of varying quality
• Take ownership and drive deliveries within a supportive team environment
• Follow engineering best practices, and ensure bank & regulatory compliance across the lifecycle
• Ensure the quality, security, reliability, and compliance of our solutions, promote re-use where possible.
• Help manage the department data inventory and data products
• Provide data support to internal & external stakeholders
• Be comfortable within a geographically spread, fast-moving Agile team
• Continuously up-skill, learn new technologies and practices, reuse strategic platforms and standards, evaluate options, and make decisions with long-term sustainability in mind.

jobs.title: Senior Electronic Algorithmic Trading Quantitative Analyst

titleByLocale.en: Senior Electronic Algorithmic Trading Quantitative Analyst
titleByLocale.it: Senior Electronic Algorithmic Trading Quantitative Analista
titleByLocale.de: Senior Electronic Algorithmic Trading Quantitative Analyst
titleByLocale.fr: Senior Electronic Algorithmic Trading Quantitative Analyste

jobs.description:
Are you passionate about performing research, analyzing data and coding up improvements to complex algorithmic trading strategies? We're looking for someone to analyze, adapt and improve the quantitative performance of UBS’s suite of agency algorithmic trading and smart order routing strategies.

The successful candidate will primarily:
• perform thorough research on areas such as market microstructure and market impact analysis.
• perform Transaction Costs Analysis (TCA) to minimize executions costs.
• improve consistency of algo performance and reduce outliers and risk, particularly during significant unscheduled as well as scheduled events e.g. index rebalance events.
• design and spec new trading strategies with a particular focus on low latency trading strategies.
• analyze trading patterns and trends within market data (L2 or L3 format).
• employ modern data analytical tools such as machine learning but in a controlled and practical way.
• adapt algorithms to adjust to new markets, venues, order types, asset classes and regulation.
• generate intraday trading signals and volume forecasts from microseconds to minutes.
• communicate with internal stakeholders and external clients and vendors to understand business requirements and market trends.
• produce analytics and reports to monitor and benchmark trading performance both internally and for clients

• employ modern data analytical tools such as machine learning but in a controlled and practical way.
• adapt algorithms to adjust to new markets, venues, order types, asset classes and regulation.
• generate intraday trading signals and volume forecasts from microseconds to minutes.
• communicate with internal stakeholders and external clients and vendors to understand business requirements and market trends.
• produce analytics and reports to monitor and benchmark trading performance both internally and for clients

Are you passionate about performing research, analyzing data and coding up improvements to complex algorithmic trading strategies? We're looking for someone to analyze, adapt and improve the quantitative performance of UBS’s suite of agency algorithmic trading and smart order routing strategies.

jobs.title: SAP Finance Functional Business Lead
jobs.description:
The SAP Business Integration Lead (ED) is accountable for end to end business integration across SAP S/4HANA, FPSL, Group Reporting and SAC within the multi-year ampliFi program. You will be the primary architect of the bridge between banking finance operations and SAP technical execution. The role ensures that business requirements, finance processes, data, and SAP solutions are cohesive, scalable, and aligned to global standards, acting as a senior partner to Design Authority and program leadership. Accountable for ensuring functional integrity, data lineage, controls, and operating model alignment across the finance value chain for a complex multi-national Tier 1 bank.

Key Responsibilities
- Own end to end solution design and integration across Finance domains, ensuring consistency across processes, data flows, and reporting outcomes.
- Act as a senior Design Authority partner, providing direction, challenge, and oversight on solution and integration decisions.
- Translate complex finance and business requirements into integrated SAP S/4HANA designs.
- Oversee integration between SAP and non SAP systems, ensuring clarity on accounting impacts and downstream reporting.
- Partner with Functional, Data, Testing, Deployment, and Change teams to enable successful delivery.
- Engage with senior stakeholders, providing clear insights on risks, dependencies, and design trade offs.
- Translate complex SAP capabilities into business value and vice versa.
- Shape and evolve the future state business integration architecture to support global rollout and long term sustainability.

Required Experience & Skills
- 10+ years of Extensive experience in large scale SAP S/4HANA Finance transformations. Global Deployment experience preferred. - Experience in SAP BTP a plus Banking domain experience (wealth management, investment banking, retail)
- Experience with multi-GAAP and multi-currency environments
- Strong finance domain knowledge (Accounting, Reporting, Controlling, Consolidation).
- Proven track record of leading large-scale global finance transformation (Big4 or equivalent background preferred).
- Ability to operate credibly at senior executive level, influencing and challenging stakeholders.
- Strong communication and leadership skills.

jobs.description:
An exciting opportunity is available in FAC PC in which the candidate will be responsible for:

• Review & production of daily/monthly P&L and balance sheet
• Validating T0 v/s T1
• Providing commentary on P&L drivers and T0 v T1 variance
• Performing relevant PnL and Balance sheet checks and ensure that they are correctly reported on daily & month ends
• Performing reconciliations and ensuring that all breaks/ issues are identified and resolved
• Ensuring that all the controls are adhered

• identify and meet client needs, coordinating and working alongside senior colleagues and investors

jobs.title: Market Executive
jobs.description:
We’re looking for a Market Executive to:

• create a vision and business development strategy
• coach branch managers and financial advisors to deliver excellent client service, drive business growth, improve retention and establish a robust local presence
• set financial advisor recruiting goals, lead recruiting activities and oversee the transition of advisors
• monitor and resolve (in collaboration with partners) escalated issues, including financial, reputational, compliance, supervisory, operational and HR governance risks
• partner with the management team to manage day-to-day activities
• manage P&L, and incorporate P&L considerations in business decisions

jobs.title: Global banking - Investment Banking Associate
jobs.description:
Are you a leader in innovation? Do you know how to come up with creative ideas for clients? We’re looking for an Associate in the Global Markets to :

•take lead in the execution of mandates working with cross functional teams and senior bankers. Carry out valuations, financial modeling, credit, capital structure and financial returns analysis & lead on transaction execution
• •work with senior coverage – sector and product bankers to come up with new ideas to pitch to companies.
• •work with industry / corporate finance team to execute transactions, and position companies, liaison with syndicate / sales team to market transaction.
• •prepare and present materials such as information memorandums and presentations for boards of directors, internal review committees and solicitations (pitches)
• •assessment and evaluation of key trends and opportunities for the specific sectors.
• •help to drive the client franchise by working with our sector groups and global offices to generate opportunities of relevance and clients.
•you will be encouraged to mentor, guide and develop Analysts/ ENOs, help coordinate Analyst/ENOs work on projects, develop them through delegation of responsibility, and takes a prominent role in training initiatives.
•deliver continuous process improvements, in view of the changing operating and regulatory environment

jobs.title: Emerging Technology Lawyer
jobs.description:
Are you passionate about the intersection of law and cutting-edge technology? Join us and be a part of the transformation in the financial market.
We are looking for a seasoned lawyer with excellent collaboration and communication skills, experienced in exploring and shaping the intersection of law and emerging technology in the financial industry.
Provide strategic legal advice on the implementation and roll-out of emerging technologies (primarily AI and Distributed Ledger Technologies such as Crypto, Stablecoins and tokenized assets). Collaborate seamlessly regionally and globally within the legal department and other control functions to unlock emerging technology's potential as a differentiator. Stay ahead of related regulatory changes and provide expert legal advocacy support.
For this role you need
• an analytical and curious mindset paired with strong academic skills. Given the evolving nature of regulations and the lack of established case law, it is essential to navigate unprecedented scenarios with sound judgment, anticipating how regulators will likely assess emerging issues.
• strong drafting and communication skills, including a clear and concise communication style.
• to be able to excel in a fast-paced, global environment, working independently and as a key team partner.
• to be collaborative, proactive and adaptable, with a proven legal track record in advising on use of emerging technology in the financial industry.
